RemediationStrings.Title: PKINITHashAlgorithmConfigurationEnabled (Kerberos)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\KDC\Parameters\PKINITHashAlgorithmConfigurationEnabled must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Kerberos.

RemediationStrings.Title: PKINITSHA1 (Kerberos)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\KDC\Parameters\PKINITSHA1 must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: Kerberos.

RemediationStrings.Title: PKINITSHA256 (Kerberos)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\KDC\Parameters\PKINITSHA256 must be 3. Severity: Medium. Category: Kerberos.

RemediationStrings.Title: PKINITSHA384 (Kerberos)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\KDC\Parameters\PKINITSHA384 must be 3. Severity: Medium. Category: Kerberos.

RemediationStrings.Title: PKINITSHA512 (Kerberos)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\KDC\Parameters\PKINITSHA512 must be 3. Severity: Medium. Category: Kerberos.

RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\Kerberos\Parameters\PKInitHashAlgorithmConfigurationEnabled must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Kerberos.
